programme.desc: A killer pursues a woman (Lori Loughlin) after she buys a storage unit that contains something valuable.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: A Case of Murder
programme.desc: After buying an old reel-to-reel recorder at a garage sale, Jenn discovers that it includes the sound of a man pleading for his life.

programme.title: Coming Home
programme.desc: Going behind the scenes of the production of the Crave Original drama series "Little Bird," and the groundbreaking movement for Indigenous narrative sovereignty as experienced by the series' creatives, crew and Sixties Scoop advisors.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries
programme.desc: Every year, Jennifer and her friend Miles Wexford participate in the organization of an auction of goods seized by the police; the night of the auction, Miles is found dead in his store.

programme.title: Youngblood
programme.desc: Follows Dean Youngblood, a hockey prodigy who joins the Hamilton Bulldogs and has to deal with toxic behavior during his journey to the National Hockey League draft.

programme.title: Saltburn
programme.desc: A student is invited to an eccentric classmate's estate for an exciting summer.

programme.title: Canada's Drag Race
programme.desc: The world of pageantry is celebrated through improv with a small-town twist; guest host Allie X.

programme.title: Hair of the Bear
programme.desc: Suffering from debilitating anxiety and refusing to go to school, 16-year-old Tori is driven to stay with her grandfather in a remote frozen wilderness but unexpectedly finds herself caught up in a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Karen is tasked with playing an online phone game for Fitzy while Wanda and Hank settle a bet with mini putt.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Oscar is disturbed to learn he and Emma have different notions about their final resting place; Wanda becomes obsessed with a productivity app while Lacey and Hank talk Brent into renovations.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash faces an important figure from his past and must solve a public health crisis; hospital administration calls Devi's leadership into question; Mags doubts all of her choices; June is asked to oversee a sensitive procedure.

programme.title: A Beautiful Place to Die: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: After being forced into early retirement, former detective Jeff Jackson returns to a quiet life on Martha's Vineyard. Quiet, at least, until a body washes up, and he's drawn back into crime solving.

programme.title: Riddled With Deceit: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: Former Detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr. Zee Madeiras to track down their friend's missing emerald brooch, a thief and a murderer.

programme.title: A Zest for Death: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah Swensen is determined to get to the bottom of the mystery after her mother finds the dead body of a homeowner, and frequent patron of The Cookie Jar, while house-hunting for her sister Michelle.

programme.title: We Three Kings
programme.desc: A retired musician hatches a plan to bring his three daughters home for Christmas for the first time since their mother's death. Holiday songs and old memories soon make the estranged siblings realize that life is better when they're all together.

programme.title: No Time to Die
programme.desc: James Bond enjoys a tranquil life in Jamaica after leaving active service. His peace, though, is short-lived as his old CIA friend, Felix Leiter, shows up and asks for help. The mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond on the trail of a mysterious villain who's armed with a dangerous new technology.

programme.title: Batman Begins
programme.desc: A young Bruce Wayne travels to the Far East, where he's trained in the martial arts by Henri Ducard, a member of the mysterious League of Shadows. When Ducard reveals the League's true purpose -- the complete destruction of Gotham City -- Wayne returns to Gotham intent on cleaning up the city without resorting to murder. With the help of Alfred, his loyal butler, and Lucius Fox, a tech expert at W

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: When Superman gets drawn into conflicts at home and abroad, his actions are questioned, giving tech billionaire Lex Luthor the opportunity to get the Man of Steel out of the way for good. Will intrepid reporter Lois Lane and Superman's four-legged companion, Krypto, be able to help him before it's too late?

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their Mississippi hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

programme.title: Lovely
programme.desc: An up-and-coming boxer from the projects begins questioning his dream after unforeseen circumstances alter his life.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: It's Halloween in Dog River and Brent, Lacey, Wanda, and Hank face a possible haunting at Brent's house; Oscar and Emma realize angry teenagers are targeting them for pranks and recruit Karen and Davis to help them defend their home.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Brent, Lacey, Oscar, Hank, Davis, Karen, Wanda, and Emma are all getting a cartoon makeover as they return to Dog River for more adventures.

programme.desc: Every year, Jennifer and her friend Miles Wexford participate in the organization of an auction of goods seized by the police. programme.title: We Grown Now
programme.desc: In 1992 best friends Malik and Eric traverse the city of Chicago, looking to escape the mundaneness of school and the hardships of growing up in public housing. They soon find their unbreakable bond challenged when a tragedy shakes their community.

programme.title: The Wish Swap
programme.desc: When Casey and Henry find themselves celebrating their birthdays at the same restaurant, they make birthday wishes at the same time which are granted. However, they end up getting each other's wishes.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Ethan tries to diagnose a man with no symptoms; Sarah uses pepper spray on an aggressive patient; Will treats a young couple willing to sacrifice anything to have a baby; Natalie must inform a woman that she was sterilized as a young girl.

programme.title: Duster
programme.desc: After Jim learns that he's being pursued by an assassin, he and Saxton's son Royce are ambushed by rogue thieves while on a high-stakes delivery; Nina and Awan trace a cryptic message to an unexpected place.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: The doctors of Chicago Med try to bring justice to the perpetrator in the shooting of Dr. Charles; Robin is discharged from the rehabilitation center, but Dr. Rhodes worries that her problems are not quite resolved; Maggie sticks up for a patient.
